privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for wazuh_env secure_agent_enrollment task by confirming that the environment uses a synthetic configuration setup. Explicitly verified the required target password ('SecuRe!Enroll2024'), configuration file ('/var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf'), and password file ('/var/ossec/etc/authd.pass') against the task description and verifier logic. Also confirmed the expected container name 'wazuh-wazuh.manager-1'.
